title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 09 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 09 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report October 09 2025
summary:
Main
The iron ore futures opened lower but closed higher today. The most-traded contract I2601 finally se led at 790.5, up 0.96% from the pre-holiday price.Traders sold at market prices, while steel mills mainly adopted a cau ous wait-and-see approach, resul ng in limited inquiries in the market. In Shandong, the mainstream transac on prices for old-grade PB fines were around 780-785 yuan/mt, up 5-10 yuan/mt from the pre-holiday price; in Tangshan, PB fines traded at 790-795 yuan/mt, up 5-10 yuan/mt from the pre-holiday price.
